phrases.intent_en: Ask for the best view of the pink city skyline from the bridge
phrases.text_local: Quel côté du pont offre la meilleure vue sur la ville rose ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel koh-TAY doo POHN OH-fruh lah may-YUR VYU soor lah VEEL ROHZ
phrases.cultural_note: Toulouse is nicknamed 'La Ville Rose' (The Pink City) because of its distinctive rose-pink terracotta brick used in most historic buildings.

responses.english: From the middle of the bridge, west side.
responses.phonetic: duh-PWEE luh mee-LYUH doo POHN koh-TAY WEST
responses.local: Depuis le milieu du pont, côté ouest.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the river cruise departs from
phrases.text_local: D'où part la croisière sur la Garonne ?
phrases.pronunciation: DOO par lah krwah-ZYAIR soor lah gah-RON
phrases.cultural_note: River cruises on the Garonne depart from quays near the Pont Neuf.

responses.english: From the quay, just below the bridge.
responses.phonetic: doo KAY zhoost ahn BAH doo POHN
responses.local: Du quai, juste en bas du pont.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Hôtel-Dieu Saint-Jacques hospital museum is nearby
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le musée de l'Hôtel-Dieu Saint-Jacques à proximité ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh myoo-ZAY duh loh-tel-DYUH san-ZHAK ah proks-ee-mee-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Hôtel-Dieu Saint-Jacques, a UNESCO-listed pilgrim hospital beside the bridge, now houses a history of medicine museum.

responses.english: Just on the other side of the bridge, to the right.
responses.phonetic: zhoost duh LOH-truh koh-TAY doo POHN ah DRWAHT
responses.local: Juste de l'autre côté du pont, à droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the river cruise departs from near the bridge
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que la croisière fluviale part de près du pont ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh lah krwah-ZYAIR flyoo-VYAL par duh pray doo POHN
phrases.cultural_note: River boat trips on the Garonne depart from the banks near Pont Neuf, offering views of the pink city from the water.

responses.english: Yes, departures are at the Quai de la Daurade.
responses.phonetic: wee lay day-PAR sohn toh KAY duh lah doh-RAHD
responses.local: Oui, les départs sont au quai de la Daurade.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the best spot for a sunset photo is
phrases.text_local: Où est le meilleur endroit pour photographier le coucher du soleil depuis le pont ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh may-YUR ahn-DRWAH poor foh-toh-grah-FYAY luh koo-SHAY doo soh-LAY duh-PWEE luh POHN
phrases.cultural_note: Sunsets over the Garonne with the pink domes and spires of Toulouse in silhouette are spectacular from the Pont Neuf.

responses.english: From the Quai de la Daurade, facing the bridge.
responses.phonetic: duh-PWEE luh KAY duh lah doh-RAHD FAHSS oh POHN
responses.local: Depuis le quai de la Daurade, face au pont.
